SEQUENCE.COMMENT: check the already exsiting group count and member for each groups for this challenge-code,challenge-id, and entity number

MAP.COMMENT: check the size of exisitng SI

LOOP.COMMENT: loop SI doc to check status and exclude the CANCELLED

MAP.NAME: %/socialInteractions/socialInteractionStatus%='CANCELLED'
MAP.COMMENT: do nothing- this count not be considered

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: check the group and friends limit

MAP.COMMENT: inti and drop any previous unused docs

SEQUENCE.NAME: INFLUENCER
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: check friends limit for influencer type

Values.value: Allowed social circles has been reached!
Allowed friends limit has been exceeded !

SEQUENCE.NAME: GROUP
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: check friends limit for Group type

Values.value: Allowed friends limit has been exceeded.
Allowed social circles has been reached!

record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg

Values.value: Challenge-code not configured in Rules table.

record.name: type
record.value: Additional details to be concatenated with Error Msg
